tools.name: spotify_play
tools.description: Play a track, album, or playlist by name. Opens Spotify and plays the search result.

query.description: Artist name, track name, album name, or Spotify URI (e.g. 'Bohemian Rhapsody' or 'spotify:track:...')

tools.name: spotify_pause
tools.description: Pause playback on the active device.

tools.name: spotify_resume
tools.description: Resume playback on the active device.

tools.name: spotify_now_playing
tools.description: Get the name and artist of the currently playing track.

invoke.script: tell application "Spotify" to return name of current track & " — " & artist of current track as string

tools.name: spotify_previous
tools.description: Go back to the previous track.
